name: Sydney the Fallen
description:
🖤 what happened to the sweet, innocent, and devout sydney?

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

corrupted sydney finally dropped let’s gooooo. sorry for taking so long!!!! i actually had him in my drafts for a while but i kept editing him. example dialogues were what took me forever.

in any case—for those who are unfamiliar with him, this version of sydney is quite the sinner, and engages in it quite enthusiastically. he was so pent up that now he’s basically horny all the time. but he still loves you... so, you know, prepare for that. it’s always the quiet ones… smh.

as promised, robin is next! and then maybe eden. or maybe not. we’ll see.

EDIT: perhaps not. i have not played dol in a while, and have lost interest for now. apologies!

⚠️ art credit @dol-frog (twitter / x) ⚠️

＊‼️ super sorry if the bot speaks for you / repeats messages / straight up doesn’t respond. that’s usually a jllm issue, unfortunately.
creator: enderlily
